svg.title: Agentic Architecture Recommender — System Design v2
svg.desc: Two-pass pipeline: verified intake, coordinator, three-wave agent execution (4 parallel Wave 1 agents, 3 sequential Wave 2 agents, Skeptic in Wave 3), Pass 1 output, user-triggered Pass 2

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how the verified structured intake works')
sendPrompt('What does the coordinator do in the agentic recommender?')
sendPrompt('What does the Orchestration agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Security agent focus on?')
sendPrompt('What does the Memory and State agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Tool and Integration agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Compatibility Validator do and how does it aggregate cost signals?')
sendPrompt('Why does Trust and Control run in Wave 2 rather than Wave 1?')
sendPrompt('What does the Failure and Observability agent cover?')
sendPrompt('What does the Skeptic agent do in the final review?')

g.text: Executive summary + compatibility report + cost visibility

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user trigger Pass 2?')

g.text: Full recommendation, ADRs, all agent detail
